name: appfactory-enterprise
description: A full enterprise-grade app development company as an agent team: 80 specialist agents across 14 departments - any web stack (React, Next.js, Vue, Angular, Node, TypeScript, Python, Java, PHP, .NET), a full game production pipeline, and an independent audit office - with an orchestration skill that routes any mission through the right roles. v1.0: every agent research-hardened (quantified done-gates, role boundaries, June-2026 stack knowledge, skills.sh integrations).
